presets.label: Essentials
presets.description: LuCI web interface with HTTPS support.

presets.label: USB Storage
presets.description: Mount USB drives with ext4 and FAT filesystem support.

presets.description: IPv6 client support is already included in default builds; nothing extra to add.

presets.label: Monitoring
presets.description: Traffic and system statistics via collectd with LuCI graphs.
